meanings.definition: the activity of flying a glider

examples: the dollar soared against the yen

meanings.definition: fly by means of a hang glider
fly upwards or high in the sky

examples: The stock market soared after the cease-fire was announced

meanings.definition: fly a plane without an engine
ascending to a level markedly higher than the usual
of imposing height; especially standing out above others
examples: the soaring spires of the cathedral
